content: @Alexandre Courbot I don't see Alistair on here, maybe you know, if I wanted to add a new msg bindings, how is that file regenerated?
By this fine (and so very discoverable) generator: https://github.com/apopple-nvidia/nova-gsp-binding-generator
That reminded me I need to ping Alistair to merge my PR
(also we are still planning to eventually replace this with in-house generated bindings - please consider this repo as temporarily needed)
